query:
INSERT INTO user_char_full (
                    user_id, character_id, level, exp, is_uncapped, is_uncapped_override, skill_flag
                ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 0, 0)
                ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                    level = VALUES(level),
                    exp = VALUES(exp),
                    is_uncapped = VALUES(is_uncapped)
